intake_scope.user_goal: Integrate the eight decisions into an executable Western-Synastry implementation plan and create a validated coding-agent PRD.

source_inventory.title: Western-Synastry Web-App request and palette
source_inventory.claim_supported: Product intent, simple Apple-like UX and palette.
source_inventory.evidence_pointer: User request 2026-07-19 and attached palette image.

source_inventory.title: Eight sequential product and architecture decisions
source_inventory.claim_supported: Eight confirmed decisions: consent attestation, day-part windows, visible uncertainty, frontend dimensions, frontend normalization, vertical TDD slices, early real E2E and real-data MVP.
source_inventory.evidence_pointer: DEC-20260719-01 through DEC-20260719-08; TECH-INV items are review-derived controls.

source_inventory.title: New_Bazi repository
source_inventory.claim_supported: Existing BFF, profile routes, local synastry, tests and UI stack.

source_inventory.title: Evidence and craftsmanship reviews of original plan
source_inventory.evidence_pointer: Consent, unknown-time Moon, ownership, directionality, confidence, tasks and usability findings.

source_inventory.title: AI-Native PRD Architect output contract
source_inventory.claim_supported: PRD structure, traceability, security and artifact requirements.

standards_alignment.name: RFC 8259 JSON
limitations: JSON validity does not prove semantic correctness.

standards_alignment.name: JSON Schema
limitations: Validation checks structure, not runtime truth.

standards_alignment.name: SARIF
limitations: Findings are static and repository-inspected only.

risk_reasons: Calls external calculation and auth/data boundaries
Time uncertainty can create misleading precision
allowed_actions: Implement feature-flagged MVP in a branch
Run bounded staging smoke with approved credentials
blocked_actions: Public production launch without human review

mode_selection.reason: Repository-aware feature spans data, API, privacy, UX, testing, rollback and coding-agent handoff.

executive_summary.statement: Build a real-data Western-Synastry MVP through-line in New_Bazi using existing FuFirE Western calculations, with explicit uncertainty and no compatibility score.
The PRD releases implementation of the MVP, not public production launch.
executive_summary.verification_method: Quality gate and feature flag review.

problem_statement.statement: The existing synastry flow mixes Western, BaZi and fusion logic and exposes a coarse percentage score; it does not provide a focused evidence-linked Western relationship experience.
Unknown time is currently represented by a 12:00 placeholder, which must not be communicated as exact in the new product.
problem_statement.verification_method: Inspect validator and add relationship-specific tests.

goals_and_non_goals.statement: Deliver profile-to-result flow using real FuFirE calculations and a simplified evidence result.
Support exact, approximate and unknown birth times with visible sampled uncertainty.
No new FuFirE match endpoint in the current MVP.
No payment, subscription, entitlement or marketplace implementation.
No LLM narrative, Composite, Davison, transit, BaZi or Wu-Xing analysis.

stakeholders_and_users.statement: Primary user: an authenticated person seeking reflective relationship patterns without a verdict.
Product owner decides usability gate and public release.
Coding agent implements bounded slices; astrology reviewer approves rules and wording before public launch.

definitions_and_domain_glossary.statement: Consent assertion: a user statement that the second person agreed; it is not independently verified.
Sampled stability: stable requires all sampled pairs; provisional requires the canonical center pair plus at least ceil(totalPairs/2), and is not proof across every instant.
Product dimension: frontend-owned grouping of evidence for user comprehension.
Real-boundary smoke: test through running New_Bazi BFF to actual FuFirE and authenticated profile boundary without mocked upstream output.
definitions_and_domain_glossary.verification_method: Test runner configuration and evidence log.

assumptions_missing_open_questions.statement: ASSUMPTION: time-band-v1 uses five German day-part windows; sampling-v1 uses three anchors and a majority-plus-center provisional threshold.
assumptions_missing_open_questions.verification_method: Config/domain review; reversible without FuFirE change.

assumptions_missing_open_questions.statement: ASSUMPTION: five moderated usability sessions are sufficient for the first qualitative gate.
MISSING: final product name and URL slug.
MISSING: staging credentials and exact real-boundary environment.
OPEN QUESTION: which dimensions survive usability review and become candidates for API promotion.
ASSUMPTION: generated samples use shift_forward for nonexistent local times and earlier for ambiguous times, while exact nonexistent input is rejected; every adjustment remains visible.
assumptions_missing_open_questions.verification_method: DST boundary tests and method review.

product_scope.statement: MVP includes own-profile select/create, partner input, consent review, real calculation, simplified result and uncertainty method.
Post-gate scope includes six dimensions, detail, explorer, method and print.

user_journeys.statement: User signs in, selects or creates an owned profile, optionally refines an unknown own time for this analysis, then enters partner data and time precision.
User reviews both data sets, confirms the consent assertion and starts calculation.
User reads three evidence-linked patterns, understands uncertainty and opens detail evidence.

ai_ready_user_stories.statement: As an authenticated user, I can use an owner-filtered stored profile so I do not re-enter my own birth data and cannot reference another user’s profile.
As a user with only a rough time, I can select a time band and see bounded uncertainty rather than a false exact time.
As a user, I can see a small number of real calculated patterns with evidence instead of a score.
As a product owner, I can stop after the MVP and decide depth based on observed usability.

functional_requirements.statement: Select or create an own profile through existing authenticated routes; the relationship endpoint accepts personAProfileId and resolves it server-side with id + user_id.
Capture partner data without automatic persistence.
Require secondPersonConsentConfirmed=true and text version before upstream calculation.
Support exact, approximate and unknown time modes; an unknown stored own profile may receive a request-scoped approximate override without persistent mutation.
Create one or three real Western samples per person; provisional evidence requires the center pair and at least ceil(totalPairs/2) pair coverage.
Compute inter-aspect evidence, sampled stability and up to three patterns in the frontend.
Show no compatibility score or relationship verdict.
Preserve input on retry and back navigation.
Block depth expansion until usability Human Gate.
The first MVP browser E2E traverses real auth/profile/BFF/FuFirE boundaries without route interception, canned upstream response or demo profile.

non_functional_requirements.statement: Responsive at 320, 768 and 1440 CSS pixels without horizontal scrolling.
Keyboard accessible with visible focus and reduced-motion support.
Maximum three upstream samples per person, six calls per request, bounded parallelism and existing compute-rate-limit coverage.
No new runtime dependency without explicit benefit, security and bundle review.
DST resolution is explicit: exact nonexistent input fails; generated shifts/ambiguity policies are transported as warnings and never presented as exact observations.

data_model_and_core_entities.statement: RelationshipTimeInput is a discriminated union exact/approximate/unknown.
WesternSynastryTransportResponse carries pseudonymous subjects, sample roles, bodies, optional exact-only houses/angles, precision and provenance.
RelationshipAspectEvidence carries both person/body roles, aspect, orb range and sample coverage.
Use dataPrecision, sampledStability, ruleStatus and interpretationStatus; generic confidence is forbidden.
Partner input and analysis response are request-scoped in the MVP.

api_interface_requirements.statement: Authenticated POST /api/relationships/western-synastry accepts personAProfileId, request-scoped optional time refinement, ephemeral partner input and versioned consent assertion.
Missing or false consent returns 422 before any FuFirE call.
BFF uses existing FuFirE POST /v1/calculate/western only.
Response acknowledges user attestation as not independently verified.
No dimension profile or product view-model is returned by the BFF.
Missing, malformed or foreign personAProfileId returns 404 and zero FuFirE calls.
The /api/relationships path participates in the existing compute rate limiter and returns 429 before additional fan-out.

architecture_constraints.statement: FuFirE remains the calculation source and is not modified in the MVP.
BFF owns required auth, owner-filtered profile lookup, validation, consent, rate limiting, sampling, DST policy, redaction and error mapping.
Frontend owns product analysis and dimension configuration.
Current compareProfiles score helper is prohibited in the new flow.
API promotion is deferred to API-001 after user and domain evidence.

security_privacy_and_compliance.statement: Consent is a required attestation and never represented as externally verified.
Names, dates, times, places, coordinates and upstream payloads are redacted from logs.
FuFirE and Supabase secrets remain server-side.
The relationship route requires auth and resolves personAProfileId with id + user_id; partner persistence is not invoked.
BLOCKER: public launch requires final privacy and consent copy review.
The relationship endpoint is included in the existing compute-rate-limit group and rejects over-limit calls before upstream fan-out.

sustainability_and_greenops.statement: Cap sampling at three charts per person, six calls per request, and apply compute rate limiting; avoid duplicate calls within one request.
LLM generation is excluded from MVP to avoid unproven latency, cost and token usage.

context_engineering_artifacts.statement: Decision record is mandatory context for the coding agent.
Implementation plan and machine-readable PRD are source-of-truth artifacts.
API-001 captures deferred FuFirE promotion and prevents scope drift.

implementation_phases.statement: Baseline and contracts: characterize old flow, define time/consent/status types.
Vertical Slice A: own profile, partner input and consent.
Vertical Slice B: BFF real Western sampling and client contract.
Vertical Slice C: sampled evidence, simplified result and first real-boundary browser E2E.
Conditional full dimensions, explorer, method and print.

atomic_task_breakdown.statement: Freeze current relationship baseline without changing runtime.
Define relationship types, time bands and status vocabulary.
Build own-profile selection/creation plus transient time refinement for an unknown stored profile.
Build review and consent assertion step.
Write authenticated BFF route, owner-filter, consent, call-cap and rate-limit tests first.
Implement authenticated relationship BFF route using owned profile lookup and existing FuFirE Western endpoint.
Implement sampled aspect stability with all-pairs stable and center-plus-majority provisional threshold.
Add the first real-boundary browser E2E with actual auth/profile/BFF/FuFirE boundaries and no route interception.
Run the MVP evidence/release gate and record exact static, browser and real-boundary results.
Run and document usability Human Gate.
Expand to accepted six dimensions after gate.
Add accepted explorer, method, print and rollout hardening while retaining real-boundary regression.

acceptance_criteria.statement: Missing/false consent returns 422 and produces zero upstream calls.
Owned-profile boundary resolves personAProfileId using id + user_id; foreign/missing IDs return 404 and zero upstream calls.
Exact mode produces one sample per exact person and may expose exact houses/angles.
Approximate/unknown use bounded samples; provisional requires center pair plus at least ceil(totalPairs/2), and houses/angles remain unavailable unless both are exact.
Real-boundary flow reaches actual authenticated profile persistence and actual FuFirE with no route interception or canned upstream response.
New flow contains no score or relationship verdict.
Every displayed pattern carries body roles, aspect/orb range, sample coverage and explicit statuses.
Depth work begins only after the real MVP evidence gate and a recorded usability decision.
Exact nonexistent local time is rejected; generated DST adjustments or ambiguity policies are surfaced in transport warnings.
Compute rate-limit returns 429 and prevents further FuFirE fan-out.
Partner input and analysis result are not automatically persisted; storage calls are absent from the relationship flow.
Public launch remains blocked until astrology wording, privacy wording and consent copy receive recorded human approval.

test_strategy.statement: Unit/route test consent 422 and zero upstream calls.
Authenticated own-profile select/create, transient unknown-time refinement and owner-filter regression.
test_strategy.verification_method: npm test -- ProfileStep and app.profiles tests.

test_strategy.statement: BFF auth, owner lookup, consent short-circuit, call count and transport contract with process-local upstream double.
Aspect symmetry, role preservation, center-plus-majority sampled stability and no generic confidence.
Gated Playwright real-boundary smoke with actual auth/profile persistence and actual FuFirE, no route interception.
Static/DOM check excludes compareProfiles and all compatibility percentages.
Responsive, keyboard, contrast and reduced-motion checks.
DST boundary tests for exact rejection, generated shift warning and ambiguous-time policy.
Dedicated relationship compute-rate-limit test proves 429 and zero additional upstream fan-out.
Storage spy and repository review prove the relationship flow does not write partner input or analysis result.
Bundle/env/log review proves FuFirE and Supabase secrets and raw birth payloads are not exposed.
Human review checklist records astrology, privacy and consent-copy approval before public launch.

observability_and_monitoring.statement: Log request ID, duration, sample count, status and upstream code without PII.
Record real-boundary request ID and evidence class in the completion report.
No fake progress percentage; UI shows named processing stages only.

risk_register.statement: Consent copy may be mistaken for verified consent. Mitigation: explicit attestation wording and 422 gate.
Discrete samples may miss behavior between sample points. Mitigation: center-plus-majority threshold, visible sampled approximation, capped claims and later interval-engine review.
Frontend-owned rules can diverge across future clients. Mitigation: version rules and API-001 promotion gate.
Real-boundary staging may be unavailable. Mitigation: do not claim acceptance; keep flag disabled.
Pastel visual polish may hide comprehension problems. Mitigation: usability gate before depth.
Profile ID without server-side owner filtering could expose or process another user’s birth data. Mitigation: required auth, id + user_id lookup, 404 and zero-upstream authz test.
Generated samples on DST transitions can shift or duplicate local time. Mitigation: explicit policies, warnings and boundary tests.

rollback_and_checkpoints.statement: Feature stays behind RELATIONSHIP_MVP_ENABLED; disable to revert user exposure.
Old Synastry tab and route remain until user acceptance.
Stop after real-boundary MVP and request Human Gate before TASK-017.
No DB migration or FuFirE change is required, reducing rollback surface.

definition_of_done.statement: TASK-001 through TASK-015 implemented with recorded focused, typecheck, build and real-boundary results; no result is presumed green in advance.
Real-boundary smoke passes and records request ID without PII.
No score, demo result, placeholder, route interception or canned upstream response supports the completion claim.
Usability Human Gate is documented before depth expansion.

agent_handoff_instructions.statement: Read decision record, PRD and plan before editing code.
Implement tasks in order and stop after the TASK-015 evidence gate for review.
Stop if DB migration, FuFirE modification, partner persistence, consent meaning change, owner-filter bypass, rate-limit bypass or more than three samples per person becomes necessary.
Report exact commands, outputs, evidence class and residual limitations.

limitations: Static inspection; runtime not executed in this artifact build.
Shows current placeholder behavior, not desired behavior.

evidence_ledger.quote_or_pointer: src/server/app.ts lines 820-865 and nb_profiles migration with RLS
limitations: Live Supabase boundary not tested here.

evidence_ledger.quote_or_pointer: FuFirE routers/western.py and New_Bazi fufireClient.ts postWestern
limitations: No live call executed during document generation.

evidence_ledger.quote_or_pointer: User explicitly chose mandatory checkbox attestation as the maximum verifiable consent control.
limitations: Attestation does not prove actual consent.

evidence_ledger.quote_or_pointer: User chose rough day-part input and uncertainty range rather than omitting all Moon-related material.
limitations: Exact time-band boundaries are a reversible assumption.

evidence_ledger.quote_or_pointer: User chose frontend ownership for dimensions and normalization with a later API ticket.
limitations: Future multi-client consistency remains a risk.

evidence_ledger.quote_or_pointer: MISSING: real staging smoke has not yet run.
src/server/app.ts /api/me/profiles uses requireUserAuth and user_id owner filters.
limitations: New relationship route is not yet implemented.

evidence_ledger.quote_or_pointer: src/server/app.ts has global and compute rate limiters; relationship path must be added to compute group.
limitations: Coverage for the new path is a planned change.

findings.claim: Current compareProfiles percentage is too coarse for the new Western-only product and must not be reused.
findings.impact: Would present a misleading verdict and mix BaZi with Western scope.
findings.recommendation: Prohibit import and add no-score DOM/static tests.

findings.claim: Current unknown-time path substitutes 12:00 and therefore needs a relationship-specific uncertainty model.
findings.impact: Could make uncertain Moon/angle outputs appear exact.
findings.recommendation: Use exact/approximate/unknown union and sampled stability.

findings.claim: Current synastry route has no required second-person consent assertion.
findings.impact: A caller can start pair analysis without even attesting permission.
findings.recommendation: Add BFF 422 gate and explicit non-verification wording.

findings.claim: Product dimensions are not yet evidence-backed as a reusable API standard.
findings.impact: Premature API standardization would increase migration cost.
findings.recommendation: Keep versioned frontend config and defer API promotion to API-001.

findings.claim: Real-boundary behavior remains unverified until staging smoke executes.
findings.impact: Static, unit or process-local integration tests cannot support a real-function claim.
findings.recommendation: Run the first browser E2E against actual profile and FuFirE boundaries and record request ID.

findings.claim: The new analysis should not trust raw Person-A data when the MVP promise is an owned stored profile boundary.
findings.impact: A caller could bypass profile ownership and the real-boundary test would validate the wrong trust model.
findings.recommendation: Accept personAProfileId, resolve with id + user_id, return 404 and make zero upstream calls on mismatch.

findings.claim: The existing compute limiter does not automatically cover a new /api/relationships path unless explicitly added.
findings.impact: One request can fan out to six paid upstream calls, increasing abuse and cost exposure.
findings.recommendation: Add the path to the compute limiter and test 429 before fan-out.

authentication.statement: Use existing Supabase authentication for persisted own-profile access; anonymous MVP profile persistence is not introduced.

authorization.statement: Require auth and resolve personAProfileId with id + user_id; return 404 and zero FuFirE calls for missing/foreign IDs. Partner data are not persisted.

secrets_management.statement: FuFirE and Supabase service credentials remain server-side and are never serialized to the browser.

logging_and_redaction.statement: Log request ID, status and sample count only; redact names, birth data, location and payloads.

data_protection.statement: Partner data and results are request-scoped; no automatic persistence or analytics payload contains birth data.

abuse_cases.statement: Reject absent/false consent, invalid profile IDs, oversized inputs, excessive sample fan-out and compute-rate-limit violations before upstream calls.

destructive_action_controls.statement: No migration, deletion or partner persistence action is in current scope; feature rollback uses a flag.

security_tests.statement: Add consent short-circuit, owner-filter, log-redaction, compute-rate-limit and secret/bundle tests plus a separate real-boundary smoke.

privacy_controls.statement: UI states that attestation is user-provided and not independently verified; final public wording needs human review.

human_review_checkpoints.statement: Privacy/text review before public launch and human usability gate before depth expansion.

agent_handoff.objective: Implement TASK-001 through TASK-015 and stop after the real-boundary evidence gate before depth expansion.
allowed_files: New relationship modules and tests listed in the plan
Bounded additive edits to src/server/app.ts, src/api/bazodiacClient.ts, src/App.tsx, PageShell and scoped CSS
prohibited_files: Existing score helper except tests documenting non-use
prohibited_actions: Add compatibility score or deterministic verdict
Bypass consent, owner filter or compute rate limit
Use route interception, demo profile or canned upstream response as real-boundary evidence
stop_conditions: A new FuFirE endpoint is required
Owner-filter or rate-limit behavior cannot be preserved
More than three samples per person are required
Staging credentials are unavailable for TASK-014
Depth work begins before Human Gate

gates.reason: Core behavior is defined with binary acceptance criteria and explicit uncertainty statuses.
Remaining unknowns are labeled and do not block MVP coding.
Repository facts and user decisions have source IDs; runtime remains explicitly unverified.
FuFirE, BFF and frontend ownership are explicit; API promotion is deferred.
Time modes, evidence roles, lifecycle and non-persistence are explicit.
Consent attestation, auth boundary, redaction and stop rules are specified; public launch remains human-gated.
Tasks, allowed files, commands, rollback and stop conditions are defined.
Requirements map to tests and real-boundary evidence.
Markdown, JSON and SARIF artifacts are emitted and validated.

open_questions.question: What is the final product name and URL slug?
Which dimensions and labels survive the usability gate?
Are staging credentials available for the required real-boundary smoke?
Has final astrology, privacy and consent copy been approved for public launch?
